positive: An aesthetically pleasing, stylized minimalist scene featuring a flock of abstract geometric birds taking flight around a stylized crescent moon and grouping of gentle, glowing mountain peaks. The composition should be circular and balanced, utilizing negative space dramatically. The art style must be vector illustration, neo-geometric, inspired by Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints but modernized for textile printing. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep indigo, creamy off-white, burnt orange, and muted teal. Strong, clean silhouettes are paramount, achieving high contrast against the background. The overall feel should be calming, ethereal, and sophisticated, suitable for all ages and decorative apparel prints. Highly detailed illustration, vector lines, flat colors, symmetry, high resolution.
negative: photorealism, 3d render, grainy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, low quality, bad anatomy, disfigured, muted, muddy colors
